prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-GOLDKIT-9PC-PARENT Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 9pc Gold Prospecting Recovery Kit with 1/8 Classifier Screen and Rock Pick Hammer Description: Get in on the gold rush! Whether you’re a seasoned prospector or just planning to poke around your local riverbed for the first time, the ASR Outdoor 9 Piece Prospecting Equipment Gold Panning Kit with green dual riffle gold pans is a great starter gold kit for adults and beginners as it comes with all the essential gold mining equipment that an experienced gold miner needs to get the good paydirt out of the ground. The only thing not included with this is the gold sluice box.

This classic gold panning kit features a comprehensive collection of gold mining tools for gold recovery and gold storage, including a heavy duty rock pick hammer as well as the following:

(2) dual riffle gold pans (10 inch and 12 inch)

(1) magnifying tweezers with 4x magnification

(2) collection storage for gold nuggets, gem or precious metals storage with screw top

(1) Geology rock pick hammer

(1) 1/8inch soil sifter pan classifier screen

(1) pick up tool

(1) plastic hand trowel

There are two stand out components of prospecting equipment in this gold panning kit. The first are the 10-inch and 12-inch dual riffle gold prospecting pans. With both shallow and deep riffles, a wide textured bottom for effective material deposit separation and deep green color to highlight even the finest gold flakes in the bottom of your pan, the riffled traps work to catch precious metals as the lighter material flows out of the pan, efficiently increasing your gold recovery efforts over traditional finishing gold pans.

The second noteworthy component is the rock pick hammer. This must have geology mining hammer is a field-tested gold prospecting mineral mining tool that features one-piece, forged steel construction with a dual face hammer head. It will dish out a solid pounding without overexerting yourself. It features a square face on one end and a pointed tip rock pick on the other, the head weighs 20 ounces, giving it great balance and superior power-to-weight ratio, allowing you to strike with precision and drive chisels into rocks with confidence.

This ASR Outdoor classic field prospecting gold panning kit features products that are made from high quality material; these gold mining tools will see you through many gold panning seasons to come.

Happy prospecting, we hope you strike it rich! Search Terms: gold panning kit for kids recovery prospecting outdoor adults supplies equipment beginners mining sluice tools pan geology gem stone collecting Features: - GOLD PANNING KIT: All the essentials in one complete kit. Get ready to pan for gold on your next outdoor gold panning adventure with this complete collection of gold mining tools for gold recovery and gold storage; suitable for beginners or seasoned gold prospectors alike - DUAL RIFFLE GOLD PANS: Increase your yield with high quality gold panning equipment. This gold panning kit includes dual riffle gold pan; with both shallow and deep riffles, a wide textured bottom for material deposit separation and deep green color to highlight even the finest gold in the bottom of your pan, effectively and efficiently increasing your gold recovery efforts - MULTIPURPOSE ROCK HAMMER: This is a field-tested gold prospecting mineral mining tool that features one-piece, forged steel construction with a dual face hammer head; a square face on one end and a pointed tip rock pick on the other; the head weighs 20 ounces giving it great balance and superior power-to-weight ratio, allowing you to strike with precision and drive chisels into rocks with confidence - GOLD MINING EQUIPMENT: All the equipment in this gold panning kit is made from high quality materials that will see you through many gold prospecting seasons to come and will stand up to lots of wear and tear - GOLD PROSPECTING KIT INCLUDES: (2) dual riffle gold pans, a 10" and 12", (1) rock pick hammer, (1) 1/8 coarse classifier screen, (1) gold recovery tool, magnifying tweezer with 4x magnification, (1) plastic hand trowel sand scoop and (2) gold nugget small collection tools === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 9pc Gold Prospecting Recovery Kit
